settings.title: Every thread tells a story of hands, heritage, and hope
settings.body: A Charkha Story began with a single question: what if clothing could carry meaning? We connect you directly with artisan families across India, so every piece you wear supports a livelihood and preserves a living tradition.

settings.quote: We believe clothing should carry meaning. Every thread, every colour, every pattern is a conversation between the maker and the wearer.

settings.title: 100% Handmade
settings.description: Every piece is crafted by hand — no machines, no shortcuts. From dyeing and printing to weaving and stitching, each step is done by artisan hands.

settings.title: Sustainable Materials
settings.description: Natural dyes, organic cotton, and zero-waste processes. We choose materials that respect the earth and the people who work with them.

settings.title: Fair & Direct Trade
settings.description: We pay artisans fairly and work directly with cooperatives — no middlemen. Your purchase supports families and keeps craft traditions alive.

settings.title: What We Stand For
settings.subtitle: Three principles guide every decision we make — from the loom to your door.

settings.title: The Seed
settings.description: A visit to the weavers of Shantipur planted the idea for A Charkha Story.

settings.title: First Collection
settings.description: Our debut collection of handwoven muslin sarees reached 500 customers across India.

settings.title: Artisan Network Grows
settings.description: Expanded to work with 40+ artisan cooperatives across 12 Indian states.

settings.title: 2,300+ Artisans
settings.description: Today we support over 2,300 artisan families and continue to grow.

settings.title: Full Category Range
settings.description: Womenswear, menswear, accessories, bags, and home — all handcrafted.

settings.title: Our Journey
settings.subtitle: From a single loom to a community of 2,300+ artisans.

settings.name: The A Charkha Story Team
settings.bio:
What started as a personal journey through the weaving villages of Bengal has grown into a mission to preserve India's handloom and handicraft heritage.

We work directly with over 2,300 artisans across 12 states — ensuring fair wages, creative freedom, and a direct connection between the maker and the wearer. Every product we sell carries the fingerprint of its maker and the story of its origin.

Our promise: no middlemen, no mass production, no compromise on craft.

settings.title: Join the Acharkhastory Family
settings.subtitle: Be the first to know about new collections, craft stories, and exclusive offers.
